notes: Model 204 web-enablement product; allowed mainframe M204 applications to serve HTTP; now Rocket Software property; still runs on z/OS, z/VSE, z/VM
High-performance mainframe DBMS; CCA acquired by Rocket Software 2010; rebranded Rocket M204; still in production use at banks and government agencies
Subject platform for web enablement; running MVS/ESA and OS/390 in 1997; evolved to z/OS; still in widespread enterprise use
